CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value_a DOUBLE, value_b DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (5, NULL, NULL);
SELECT sys.covar_samp(value_a, value_b) FROM test_data WHERE value_a IS NOT NULL AND value_b IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, value_a DOUBLE, value_b DOUBLE);
SELECT sys.covar_samp(t1.value_a, t2.value_b) FROM test_data AS t1 JOIN additional_data AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT sys.covar_samp(value_a, value_b) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data) AS subquery;
